raw_text:
<think>
The user wants a plain text record with three key=value lines: route_verdict, repair_target, blocked_move. The user provided data: route_verdict=CONTINUE, repair_target=stress-test and preserve blocker ids: ART-001-BLK-07C1CACD, blocked_move=do not override blocker with consensus unless sources close it.

We need to output exactly those three lines, in order, with no extra formatting. So:

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=stress-test and preserve blocker ids: ART-001-BLK-07C1CACD
blocked_move=do not override blocker with consensus unless sources close it

Make sure no extra lines or spaces. The user said: Return the three-line status record. So just those lines.

One thing: Should we preserve the colon after "repair_target"? The format is "repair_target=stress-test and preserve blocker ids: ART-001-BLK-07C1CACD". The colon after "stress-test and preserve blocker ids" is part of the value, but the assignment is "repair_target=stress-test and preserve blocker ids: ART-001-BLK-07C1CACD". So it's correct.

Thus final answer: the three lines.
</think>

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=stress-test and preserve blocker ids: ART-001-BLK-07C1CACD
blocked_move=do not override blocker with consensus unless sources close it
